/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsimpleswitch_runner.so -o libsimpleswitch_runner.so CMakeFiles/simpleswitch_runner.dir/runner.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: libsimpleswitch.a ../../PI/libbmpi.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxxhash.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnanomsg.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcap.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/local/lib/libthrift.so
